instructionalDaysDescription: The official 2025-2026 Spotsylvania instructional calendar lists 178 student days.
seoTitle: Spotsylvania County Public Schools Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Spotsylvania County Public Schools 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 29 last day, holidays, breaks, teacher workdays, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Spotsylvania County Public Schools starts the 2025-2026 school year with transition day on August 11, followed by the first day of school on August 12. Fall Break runs November 24-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, Spring Break runs March 30-April 3, and the last day of school is May 29, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Spotsylvania County start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Spotsylvania County Public Schools starts school on Tuesday, August 12, 2025. The calendar also lists transition day on Monday, August 11.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spotsylvania County Fall Break in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Fall Break on the 2025-2026 SCPS calendar runs Monday, November 24 through Friday, November 28, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spotsylvania County Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 30 through Friday, April 3, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Spotsylvania County in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 29, 2026, and it is listed as an early release day.

yearNumbers.label: Student Days
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar lists 178 student days for 2025-2026.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs Monday through Friday in the final week of March and first week of April.

yearNumbers.label: Early Release Days
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists early release on May 28 and early release/last day on May 29.
